endpoints.name: General-purpose authentication
endpoints.description:
## Note:
* The JWT tokens returned should be passed to any resource that requires authentication, in the Authentication header, in the format `Bearer: your-token-here`
* Only JWT authentication tokens are provided (no refresh tokens). These tokens are valid for 30 seconds from the moment they were issued
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get gene by symbol
endpoints.description:
Gets A gene by its symbol, which can be found by querying the reference/ resource.

Will return a 404 if a gene exists as a reference, but its genomic coordinates intersect no SNPs in the dataset
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid. Replace {{CLIENTID}} with a real clientid. Replace {{GENESYMBOL}} with a real genesymbol.

endpoints.name: GET /clients/{clientId}/datasets/{datasetId}/snps/
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid. Replace {{CLIENTID}} with a real clientid.

endpoints.name: Get a large group of SNPs
endpoints.description: SNPs that are not present in the dataset are ignored, 404 is returned only if the dataset/client does not exist
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid. Replace {{CLIENTID}} with a real clientid.

endpoints.name: Get SNP information
endpoints.description:
Gets SNP information, as provided by the dataset.

If fetching this as an product, the client must have already granted access to the snip (see the 'products' group)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid. Replace {{CLIENTID}} with a real clientid. Replace {{SNPID}} with a real snpid.

endpoints.name: Get product details
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/authorizations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/authorizations/{authorizationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONID}} with a real authorizationid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: Signal that processing is complete, without uploading any result
endpoints.description: Signal that processing is complete, without uploading any result
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONID}} with a real authorizationid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: Provide a result for the authorization
endpoints.description: These can be log-in credentials for a website where the result is available
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONID}} with a real authorizationid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: Provide a file result to the authorization, e
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONID}} with a real authorizationid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: Catch-all Authorization state, for authorizations that passed all verifications and should reach the partner Product, but cannot be fulfilled for various reasons
endpoints.description: Catch-all Authorization state, for authorizations that passed all verifications and should reach the partner Product, but cannot be fulfilled for various reasons
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONID}} with a real authorizationid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: Generic gene information
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSION}} with a real accession. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: Reference genome builds
endpoints.description: Lists reference genome builds that are available
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY.

endpoints.name: Reference genome metadata
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{GENOMEBUILDACCESSION}} with a real genomebuildaccession.

endpoints.name: Sequence for a region of the reference genome
endpoints.description: Fetch a closed interval of nucleotides on a given chromosome. Includes start and stop positions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{CHROMOSOMEACCESSION}} with a real chromosomeaccession. Replace {{GENOMEBUILDACCESSION}} with a real genomebuildaccession.

endpoints.name: Reference SNP data
endpoints.description: Get reference SNP information, from dbSNP
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUMMINARY_API_KEY}} with your LUMMINARY API KEY. Replace {{SNPACCESSION}} with a real snpaccession.
